name: Deepfake Detection
description: Browser extension for detecting deepfake media with on-device processing

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' blob: https://ichef.bbci.co.uk https://*.bbc.co.uk https://*.bbci.co.uk https://cdn.syndication.twimg.com https://connect.facebook.net https://platform.twitter.com https://public.flourish.studio https://static.chartbeat.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://www.tiktok.com https://lf16-tiktok-web.ttwstatic.com https://www.ons.gov.uk https://bitesize.files.bbci.co.uk https://emp.bbci.co.uk https://mybbc-analytics.files.bbci.co.uk https://news.files.bbci.co.uk https://static.bbc.co.uk https://static2.chartbeat.com https://*.cdninstagram.com https://*.instagram.com
